video:video.video:title: KitchenAid All Purpose Kitchen Shears with Protective Sheath Durable Stainless Steel Scissors, Dishwasher Safe, Soft Grip Comfort Handle, 8.72 Inch, Black — Review
video:video.video:description: Hey, kitchen warriors! Let’s talk about the KitchenAid All Purpose Kitchen Shears! These bad boys are a game changer for just $7.

video:video.video:title: Hydro Flask 32 oz Wide Mouth Water Bottle — Review
video:video.video:description: The Hydro Flask 32oz keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12. Durable, leak-proof, and backed by a lifetime warranty — over 89k five-star reviews.

video:video.video:title: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 Electric Pressure Cooker — Review
video:video.video:description: The Instant Pot Duo replaces 7 kitchen appliances and cuts cook times by up to 70%. Over 145k five-star reviews make it the best-selling pressure cooker on Amazon.
